mapper.sql: SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", reporter.name AS "reportedByName", responsible.name AS "responsibleUserName", reviewer.name AS "reviewUserName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reporter ON reporter.id = a.reported_by LEFT JOIN sys_account responsible ON responsible.id = a.responsible_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account reviewer ON reviewer.id = a.review_user_id
